title: Full-stack Web Engineering Intern
mainText:
MyDataProduct
Internet & Software
Full-stack Web Engineering Intern
Posted 6 months ago∙Apply by September 2, 2026 at 4:00 AM
Save
Share
Apply
At a glance
$1–5K/mo
Remote, based in United States
Work from home
Internship
Part-time∙From September 15, 2025 to March 13, 2026
US work authorization required
Job description

MyDataProduct (MDP) is an independent data product studio.

Leveraging best-in-class talent, technologies, and techniques—we design and develop data-empowered software at the intersection of:

Jobs-to-be-Done-informed product strategy
Applied data science
Foundational data engineering, and
Stakeholder value obsession

Engineered with thoughtful precision, MDP data products are defined by:

Niche verticals & use cases
Full-job-cycle value propositions
ML-enabled capabilities
Synergistic data integrations, and
Hyper-personalization

We are looking for a Full-stack Web Engineering Intern for a fixed-scope, fixed-fee 1099 internship contract. This internship is 100% remote in the United States.

Consideration for this opportunity requires completion of a demo project and at least 10 hours of synchronous meeting availability between 1:00 PM and 5:00 Central Time on weekdays, for the next 6 months.

This role is not open to

Individuals on CPT/OPT/EAD
Recruiters
Agencies
Consulting companies
C2C arrangements

This role may be a good fit if

You are comfortable working 100% remotely as part of a distributed team
You excel at independent execution of full-stack web development projects
Your work products demonstrate a high level of attention to detail and the ability to see the big picture
Your aptitude, mindset, and ability to learn quickly make up for shortcomings in your current skill set
You resonate with MDP's core values:
....... 1. High performance, engagement, and reliability
....... 2. Proper prioritization, timeliness, and risk mitigation
....... 3. Outcome ownership, accountability, and meritocracy
....... 4. Systems thinking, modularity, and automation
....... 5. Excellence in execution and hyper-detail orientation
....... 6. Documentation and asynchronous work
....... 7. Resourceful initiative

This role may require you to

Develop full-stack web applications using Flask and other Python-centric tools
Provision, secure, and maintain cloud-based infrastructure via Terraform
Leverage Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE), Cloud Storage, and other GCP services to build secure, performant, scalable, reliable, and cost-effective web applications
Implement backend business logic including user authentication, authorization, and application workflows using Supabase
Test, deploy, and maintain Dockerized applications
Interface with local and cloud-based Redis servers
Work with data product engineers to integrate frontend components with backend services and functionality
Implement wireframes, high-fidelity user interface designs, and interactive prototypes using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Leverage React.js, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, and other frontend web development frameworks to streamline user interface implementations
Triage, debug, and resolve frontend issues efficiently and effectively
Participate in code reviews, user testing, and other quality assurance processes
Document source code, architectural designs, research, development plans, and engineering standards to enable solution modularity, reproducibility, portability, collaboration, and knowledge sharing
Collaborate with teammates using Slack, Figma, Google Meet, and/or other software

An ideal candidate has

A portfolio of impressive, Python-based, full-stack web applications
Proficiency in writing functional and object-oriented Python
Experience using Git-based version control in a team setting
Demonstrated ability to write and integrate custom APIs
Demonstrated experience building custom frontends with React.js, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, and other frontend web development frameworks/libraries
Practical understanding of software engineering principles, design patterns, and best practices
Effective modular thinking skills evidenced by the ability to break down large, intricate undertakings into a series of smaller self-contained tasks
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
Emotional intelligence and coachability

All details of this job description are subject to change at any time, at the sole discretion of MyDataProduct.
